overall.description: First-person cockpit view from an AS350 helicopter flying through heavy atmospheric haze and dust conditions over arid desert terrain. The visibility progressively deteriorates as the aircraft enters a dense dust storm, transitioning from golden-hour lighting to near white-out conditions. The footage appears to be from a flight simulator game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial flight over arid desert landscape during golden hour

agents.ego_description: piloting the helicopter straight and level over desert terrain, maintaining course through hazy atmospheric conditions

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument panel with flight gauges, GPS navigation, and engine instruments
cockpit window frame and structural pillar visible on the left side
arid desert landscape with subtle elevation changes visible through the haze
warm orange-tinted atmospheric haze characteristic of golden hour lighting

segments.scene_description: The helicopter cruises steadily over a vast desert landscape bathed in warm golden-hour light. The instrument panel is clearly visible in the foreground while the arid terrain passes below through a layer of atmospheric haze. Visibility is reduced but sufficient for terrain reference.

scene_state.functional_zone: entering dense dust storm over desert terrain

events.description: helicopter enters the edge of a dense dust bank, visibility begins to degrade rapidly
ambient light dims significantly as the aircraft penetrates deeper into the dust storm

agents.ego_description: continuing flight path as visibility degrades, entering the dense dust storm with reduced visual reference

entered.detail: dense brown dust cloud wall approaching and engulfing the aircraft

segments.scene_description: The helicopter transitions from hazy but navigable conditions into a dense dust storm. The golden atmosphere shifts to a thick brown haze as visibility drops significantly. The terrain below becomes increasingly obscured while the instrument panel remains clearly visible in the cockpit.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep inside dust storm with near zero visibility

events.description: visibility drops to near zero as helicopter penetrates the densest part of the dust storm

agents.ego_description: piloting through near white-out conditions with minimal external visual reference, relying on instruments

segments.scene_description: The helicopter is now deep within the dust storm, surrounded by a uniform gray-brown whiteout with virtually no ground reference visible. The lighting has dimmed considerably and the external environment is reduced to a featureless haze, while the cockpit instruments remain the only clear visual reference.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit view as a helicopter flies from a hazy desert landscape into the heart of a blinding dust storm. It begins with the aircraft cruising over vast arid terrain bathed in warm golden-hour light, where the ground remains visible through a layer of atmospheric haze. As the helicopter pushes forward, the golden atmosphere shifts into a thick brown haze, causing the terrain below to become increasingly obscured. The scene then transitions into a dense whiteout of uniform gray-brown dust, where the external environment becomes a featureless void. Finally, the lighting dims considerably, leaving the glowing instrument panel as the only clear visual reference amidst the total loss of ground visibility.
